HediffDef.label: spiritually diluted
HediffDef.description: The vital essence required by Luxandra takes time to manifest. Any semen offering at this time would lack the deep devotion necessary to pierce the veil. The altar will reject any seed that carries only mundane passion.

li.label: offered semen to Luxandra
li.description: I have offered my reproductive essence upon her altar. Knowing I pleased her gives me a deep sense of peace.
